1.text: Subpleural nonspecific nodules, each measuring 2 mm, in the upper and middle lobes of the right lung

2.text: 3 mm subpleural nodule in the dorsal area of the superior segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: 3 mm subpleural nodule in the lingular segment of the left lung

4.text: Scarring in the inferior lingular segment

5.text: 4 mm nodule at the anteromediobasal level
